title: Grandmaster's Gambit
description: Draw 2 cards, then gain 1 point for every card now in your hand. Openings win games.

title: Hoarder's Dividend
description: Gain 2 points for every card in your hand beyond the fifth. Hoarding finally pays off.

title: Deck Necromancer
description: If the deck has fewer than 10 cards left, gain 15 points. Feast on scarcity.
alt_text: a skeleton wizard raising discarded cards from a cardboard graveyard

title: Minimalist Award
description: The player holding the fewest cards gains 4 points. Ties: all tied players cash in.

title: Empty Threat
description: If this was the last card in your hand, gain 10 points. Otherwise lose 1 point per card you kept.

title: Monkey Census
description: Gain 2 points for every card in your hand whose art contains a monkey. This card's monkey is counting.
alt_text: a monkey in a tiny vest holding a clipboard, counting other monkeys

title: Art Critic
description: Gain 1 point per 10 characters of art description across the cards in your hand, up to 10. Fine art appreciates.
alt_text: a monocled critic sneering at a stick-figure drawing

title: Banana Magnet
description: If any card in your hand depicts a monkey or a banana, steal 2 points from a player of your choice.
alt_text: a monkey riding a giant horseshoe magnet through a hail of bananas

title: Wordless Wonder
description: Gain 3 points for every card in your hand with no art at all. Blank is beautiful.

title: Wealth Tax
description: Ongoing: at the start of every turn, the richest player pays 2 points and everyone else pays 1. The auditor never sleeps.

title: Echo Chamber
description: Ongoing: whenever a player gains points, they gain 1 bonus point. Hype begets hype.

human_canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    code = "def apply(state, ctx):
    amount = ctx.get('amount') or 0
    actor = ctx.get('actor_id')
    if amount > 0 and actor:
        state.add_points('id:' + actor, 1)
"
    state.register_hook('on_score_change', scope='center', code=code)

title: Karma Police
description: Ongoing: whenever the sole point leader plays a card, they lose 1 point. Heavy is the crown.

human_canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    code = "def apply(state, ctx):
    actor = ctx.get('actor_id')
    if not actor:
        return
    scores = [p.score for p in state.players()]
    top = max(scores)
    if state.player(actor).score == top and scores.count(top) == 1:
        state.subtract_points('id:' + actor, 1)
"
    state.register_hook('on_play', scope='center', code=code)

title: Overdraft Fees
description: Ongoing: any player who draws while already holding 7 or more cards loses 2 points. Storage isn't free.

human_canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    code = "def apply(state, ctx):
    actor = ctx.get('actor_id')
    if actor and state.hand_size(actor) >= 7:
        state.subtract_points('id:' + actor, 2)
"
    state.register_hook('on_draw_step', scope='center', code=code)

title: Nuh-Uh
description: Play only when another player plays a card. That card is negated. Nuh-uh.

human_canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    state.counter_play('negate')
    title = ctx.get('pending_card_title') or 'That card'
    state.note(title + ' does nothing. Nuh-uh.')

title: Grabby Hands
description: Play when another player plays a card. Negate it and take 3 points from them for trying.
alt_text: two enormous cartoon hands snatching at everything on the table

title: Mirror Match
description: Play when another player plays a card. Their card resolves as if YOU had played it. Mine now.
alt_text: a full-length mirror wearing a smug grin

human_canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    state.counter_play('redirect')
    title = ctx.get('pending_card_title') or 'that card'
    state.note('Mirror Match: ' + title + ' is mine now.')

title: Robin Hood
description: Steal 5 points from the richest player and give them to the poorest. Same person? Nothing happens. Ties break toward earlier turn order.

title: Underdog Uprising
description: Every player whose score is below the table average gains 3 points. Rise up.

title: Coin Flip of Destiny
description: Flip the cosmic coin: if your score is odd you gain 7 points, if it's even you lose 3. The coin was rigged all along.
alt_text: a two-headed coin spinning in midair

title: Photo Finish
description: If the top two players are within 3 points of each other, they both gain 5. Ties break toward earlier turn order.
alt_text: two snails crossing a finish line antenna-to-antenna

title: Musical Chairs
description: The music stops! Every player's score becomes the current score of the next player in turn order.
alt_text: empty chairs in a circle with one confused ghost still standing

title: The Great Flattening
description: Every player's score becomes the table average, rounded down. Utopia achieved; everyone is equally annoyed.

human_canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    players = state.players()
    avg = sum(p.score for p in players) // len(players)
    state.set_points('all', avg)

title: Silver Medal Syndrome
description: The player in second place gains 6 points. First place gets nothing but the fear. Ties break toward earlier turn order.

title: Lowball Auction
description: Everyone secretly bids 0-20 points. The LOWEST bidder pays their bid and gains 10 points. Ties go to the earliest player in turn order.

request.prompt: Secretly bid between 0 and 20 points. LOWEST bid wins.

steps.code:
def apply(state, ctx):
    bids = ctx['interactions']['bids']
    if not bids:
        return
    best = min(bids.values())
    winner = [pid for pid in state.turn_order if bids.get(pid) == best][0]
    state.add_points('id:' + winner, 10)
    state.subtract_points('id:' + winner, int(best))
steps.explanation: Resolve the sealed lowest-bid auction deterministically: earliest tied bidder in turn order pays their bid and takes the prize.

title: Point Referendum
description: Everyone votes in secret: TAX the current point leader 5 points, or GIFT them 5 more. Majority rules, ties tax. Leader ties break toward earlier turn order.

request.prompt: The current point leader hangs in the balance. Tax them 5 points, or gift them 5 more?

steps.explanation: Tally the sealed vote, find the leader with an earliest-turn-order tie-break, and apply the majority's verdict (ties tax).
